description_long: This is a low-top slip-on sneaker featuring a classic black and white checkerboard pattern across the canvas upper. The shoe has a white rubber midsole with a black stripe running along its edge, and a red rectangular patch with branding on the heel. The collar and interior lining are padded for comfort, and the side panels are plain white, contrasting with the patterned vamp and tongue. The shoe's silhouette is streamlined, with elastic side accents for easy wearing and removal. The overall design is iconic and casual, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A slip-on sneaker with a black and white checkerboard canvas upper, white rubber sole, and red heel branding. The design is iconic, casual, and comfortable.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the checkerboard heel, red rectangular heel patch, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the checkerboard upper, white side panel, and black midsole stripe.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full checkerboard pattern on the vamp and toe area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with checkerboard upper and plain white side panel.
attribute_logo: Red rectangular patch with Vans logo on the heel, small white tag with Vans logo on the side panel
